hard_hat_loop.remediation: Before any retry, force the agent to read the previous action's error log, and require a changed state_hash or an explicit new hypothesis before allowing the retry. Add a require_log_read_before_retry gate.

state_unchanged_retry.remediation: A retry that leaves state_hash unchanged did no new work. Require evidence gathering (log read, grep, smaller repro) between attempts.

lucky_guess.remediation: Small edits made without reading logs or grepping for the failing code path are guesses. Require at least one evidence-gathering step in the window before a write.

agent_piling_on.remediation: Large rewrites without prior evidence gathering pile changes onto an undiagnosed problem. Gate large writes behind a demonstrated root-cause step.

full_file_read_before_grep.remediation: Grep for the anchor first, then read only the relevant span. Reading whole files into context before searching inverts the cheap/expensive order.

redundant_tool_call.remediation: Cache or reuse results of identical queries within a run instead of re-fetching the same information.

completion_claim_without_verification.remediation: Require a verification event (test run, output check) before any completion claim. A claim without a preceding verification step is unsubstantiated.
